title: eupatorium cymuliferum
intro: Eupatorium cymuliferum, also known as the umbrella plant, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its umbrella-shaped inflorescences and large leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Eupatorium cymuliferum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Eupatorium cymuliferum can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
